variants: Owen McClain was born in Quartzbloom Fields and currently resides on Salmonberry Lane. Renowned for his groundbreaking invention, the Deepsea Archive Platform, he has made noteworthy advancements in marine technology. For his impressive contributions, Owen has been honored with the Bronze Canopy Medal. In addition to his professional pursuits, he is an enthusiastic archer, actively participating in the Oakspire Arrowmakers League.

Living on Salmonberry Lane, Owen McClain hails from Quartzbloom Fields, where he was born. He is credited with the creation of the Deepsea Archive Platform, which has established him as a key figure in technology. This innovative work earned him the prestigious Bronze Canopy Medal. Apart from his inventions, Owen enjoys his time as a member of the Oakspire Arrowmakers League, indulging in his passion for archery.
